text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home from a day out, we decide to
take the train back.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I had a bunch of fun today, Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I had a bunch of fun today, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding ding... ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, the train's coming. Let's get in line.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yay! There are seats open! I wanna sit at the
end! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're next to me, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're next to me, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That way, we can talk a whole bunch. ♪ Come on,
hurry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, clunk...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for taking me out today. ♪ I got so many
pics.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And they're not even all selfies. Look! I got this
candid shot of you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And they're not even all selfies. Look! I got this
candid shot of you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I wonder! Maybe I should upload this to
Umastagram... Just kidding!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We pass some time on the train by looking at the
photos Curren Chan has on her phone. But then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, clunk...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan snores peacefully. I can feel her
warmth on my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Big Bro... Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Big Sis... Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, clunk...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Big Bro...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Big Sis...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I like that... about you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yawn... That felt great!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha! And your shoulder made the best pillow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha! And your shoulder made the best pillow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to make a reservation the next time I
ride the train too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
For the seat next to you! I can't let someone else
have you, now can I?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
For the seat next to you! I can't let someone else
have you, now can I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we walk home side by side...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little closer than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I decide to gently wake her up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Ehe... Morning, Big Bro. Did you wanna talk to me more?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Ehe... Morning, Big Sis. Did you wanna talk to me more?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you insiiist! Maybe I still have some vids I
haven't showed you... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy, Umastagram! Check out these clothes!
That's right! I'm starting at Tracen Academy
today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo excited—and nervous too, thinking
about the friends I'll make and the races I'll run in!

text_block_list.name: Car
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! My ride's here! Time to go!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? Maybe I'll meet someone special
today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. That video really takes me back. It got a
million likes, you know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...It's an important memory. Maybe I should put it
in my favorites folder. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The train slows down and comes to a stop.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like we're here already. Guess it's
time to say goodbye for today, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like we're here already. Guess it's
time to say goodbye for today, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: We didn't forget anything, did we? Then...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wait, no! I did forget something! Over here, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wait, no! I did forget something! Over here, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I got another shot of you! ♪ This one's
going straight into my favorites!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan heads toward the ticket gate with a
spring in her step.
